description: The Texas Syndicate is a street and prison gang based in Texas, composed predominantly of Mexican-American citizens. It was founded in 1978 at Folsom State Prison in California as a response to other gangs preying on Texas inmates. The gang engages in drug trafficking, extortion, prostitution, and murder-for-hire, with approximately 1,300 members. It maintains a paramilitary structure and has ties to the Gulf Cartel and Los Zetas.

country_links.evidence_quote: Los miembros de la pandilla contrabandean cantidades de varios kilos de cocaína en polvo , heroína , metanfetamina , y varias toneladas de marihuana desde México a Estados Unidos para su distribución dentro y fuera de prisión.
country_links.context: The Texas Syndicate smuggles drugs from Mexico into the United States.
